message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid

participant "User application" as UserApp {
    participant Main
}

box "" #LightGray [Propagator] end box
box "" #LightGreen [Integrator] end box
box "" #WhiteSmoke [DifferentialEquations] end box
box "" #AliceBlue [OrbitType] end box
box "" #LavenderBlush1 [TimesDerivative] end box
box "#FFF8DC;#000000;fontColor:#000000;" ForceModelBox {
  participant "Force Model i\n<<interface>>\n--\n+addContribution(\norbit : Orbit,\ntd : TimesDerivatives)" <<Interface>> as FMi
}
box "" #F5DEB3 [NewtonianAttraction] end box


Main -> Propagator: propagate() 
activate Propagator 

create DifferentialEquations \nas de  
de <- Propagator:create(de)  

create NewtonianAttraction \na na   
a_na<-Propagator:: create(na)   

loop for n steps    
   Integrator->DifferentialEquations:integrate(stateIn,stateOut,tStart,hStep)\n activate DE     
     loop while !converged       
       stateCurrent=stateLast+h*derivs        
        alt if error too large          
           h=h/2         
         else           
            break      
          endif            
      end loop              
end loop    

return finalState deactivate Propagator  


@enduml
